title: ASS-LIGHT
definition: ASS-LIGHT RC1 is a user-started Android novelty application that plays original randomized comedy sounds at bounded random intervals and app-local volume levels, with optional brief flashlight pulses and a persistent stop notification, for consensual tension-breaking entertainment without covert startup, network collection, analytics, system-volume mutation, harassment tooling, or unverified completion claims. This direct-install RC uses an isolated package identity and a non-production distribution signature; Google Play promotion remains blocked until a private upload key and final store review exist.
required_capabilities: twelve original playable PCM WAV resources
manual flashlight control when hardware exists
AAB technical candidate with production signing gate explicitly blocked
promotion_law: No completion claim without build, install, execution, audit, receipt, and explicit classification of manual hardware proof gates.
